top_signals.title: Community bank group launches new ad campaign targeting Clarity Act stablecoin reward language
top_signals.summary: A key group representing small to mid-sized community banks plans to launch a new ad warning of risks in digital assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Novo’s Wegovy Pill Wins Approval in UK for Obesity Treatment
top_signals.summary: Novo Nordisk A/S’s Wegovy pill was approved in the UK, opening up the obesity market to people who are wary of taking a shot.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: OpenAI considers drastic price cuts, anticipating war for users with Anthropic, WSJ reports - Reuters
top_signals.summary: OpenAI considers drastic price cuts, anticipating war for users with Anthropic, WSJ reports  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oracle Bonds Rally as Funding Plans Signal Borrowing Discipline
top_signals.summary: Oracle Corp.’s bonds rallied on Thursday even as its shares tumbled, after the database giant calmed debt investors by saying it doesn’t expect additional bond issuance this calendar year and outlining plans to raise $40 billion of debt and equity in the current fiscal year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
